evidence: Plan: red-manual-assembly.log, green-discovery-shuffled.log, event-registration-trace.json under current attempt.
message: The requested happy path is a registration-observable dynamic event flow, not a manually assembled pipeline.

steering.evidence: Plan: red-manual-assembly.log, green-discovery-shuffled.log, event-registration-trace.json under current attempt.
steering.rationale: The requested happy path is a registration-observable dynamic event flow, not a manually assembled pipeline.

goals.title: Refactor Kateto runtime from manual pipeline assembly to automatic ev...
goals.objective: Refactor Kateto runtime from manual pipeline assembly to automatic event-driven plugin discovery. live.py must no longer own an ordered audio->Whisper->classifier->voices->TTS/player pipeline or hard-coded P0 voice routing. Add a typed discovery/registry layer that imports configured plugin and voice modules, finds enabled Plugin subclasses/factories from config, instantiates them with dependency injection, registers them with PluginManager, and relies exclusively on each plugin on_<event> handlers for routing. Update ClassifierExecutor to emit a prompt/generate event without enumerating voice names; VoiceAgents subscribe to the prompt/generate contract; audio processor/output remain event subscribers. Discovery must be reusable by RunOwner and hot-reloadable: create/modify/delete of configured plugin/voice definitions updates subscriptions without a second event loop or stale instances. Preserve fixture injection and existing event contracts; no compatibility pipeline aliases. Goal invariant: event flow observable by manager registrations and passes with dynamically discovered plugin set whose order is shuffled. Stop only when red tests demonstrate current manual assembly/voice hard-coding, green tests prove discovery, shuffled event-driven end-to-end flow, dynamic add/remove reload, cancellation/cleanup, focused suite and scoped basedpyright pass. Preserve unrelated fixes (Silero deps, calendar, smoke, types) and do not revert them. Use anyio and typed implementation. Evidence must include .omo/evidence/kateto-mvp/recovery/event-discovery/DoneClaim.json, red/green logs, event registration trace, dynamic reload trace, cleanup receipt, and changed files.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: Refactor Kateto runtime from manual pipeline assembly to automatic event-driv...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.

successCriteria.scenario: edge case (boundary/empty/malformed)
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Refactor Kateto runtime from manual pipeline assembly to automatic event-driv....

successCriteria.scenario: regression: adjacent surface still works
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Refactor Kateto runtime from manual pipeline assembly to automatic event-driv....

goals.objective: Refactor Kateto runtime from manual pipeline assembly to automatic event-driven plugin discovery. live.py must no longer own an ordered audio->Whisper->classifier->voices->TTS/player pipeline or hard-coded P0 voice routing. Add a typed discovery/registry layer that imports configured plugin and voice modules, finds enabled Plugin subclasses/factories from config, instantiates them with dependency injection, registers them with PluginManager, and relies exclusively on each plugin on_<event> handlers for routing. Update ClassifierExecutor to emit a prompt/generate event without enumerating voice names; VoiceAgents subscribe to the prompt/generate contract; audio processor/output remain event subscribers. Discovery must be reusable by RunOwner and hot-reloadable: create/modify/delete of configured plugin/voice definitions updates subscriptions without a second event loop or stale instances. Preserve fixture injection and existing event contracts; no compatibility pipeline aliases. Goal invariant: event flow observable by manager registrations and passes with dynamically discovered plugin set whose order is shuffled. Stop only when red tests demonstrate current manual assembly/voice hard-coding, green tests prove discovery, shuffled event-driven end-to-end flow, dynamic add/remove reload, cancellation/cleanup, focused suite and scoped basedpyright pass. Preserve unrelated fixes (Silero deps, calendar, smoke, types) and do not revert them. Use anyio and typed implementation. Evidence must include .omo/evidence/kateto-mvp/recovery/event-discovery/DoneClaim.json, red/green logs, event registration trace, dynamic reload trace, cleanup receipt, and changed files.

successCriteria.scenario: Run the event-discovery fixture with enabled plugin and voice definitions in shuffled order; startup must dynamically instantiate and register only the configured Plugin subclasses/factories, then audio_chunk must yield transcription, classification, untargeted generate, voice text_chunk, audio_output, and player delivery through subscribers.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/red-manual-assembly.log; .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/green-discovery-shuffled.log; .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/event-registration-trace.json

successCriteria.scenario: With a running RuntimeOwner and watched config definitions, add then remove an enabled configured plugin/voice definition; reload must replace subscriptions on the existing manager/loop, cancel old work, clear old queues, and leave no stale receiver or instance.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/dynamic-reload-trace.json; .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/cleanup-receipt.json

successCriteria.scenario: Run the focused runtime/manager/conversation/reload suite and scoped basedpyright for every changed Python file after the dynamic scenarios; records must preserve fixture injection and existing contracts without pipeline aliases.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/focused-suite.log; .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/basedpyright.log; .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/changed-files.txt; .omo/evidence/ulw/event-discovery/G001-refactor-kateto-runtime-from-manual/a1/DoneClaim.json; .omo/evidence/kateto-mvp/recovery/event-discovery/DoneClaim.json

evidence: HEAVY delivery triage: cross-module runtime/discovery/reload refactor with dynamic subscription/cancellation boundaries. Manual-QA channels: CLI stdout JSON traces for event registration and reload, plus focused test and type-check logs. No spawn_agent surface is exposed in this session, so implementation and QA will be independently executed and verified in the parent.
message: The goal has one named dependency chain: discover registry contracts before rewiring RunOwner/reload, then validate shuffled and dynamic flows. Stop immediately when every trace, cleanup receipt, focused suite, and scoped basedpyright artifact is non-empty at the frozen tree.
